# TravelNurseMortgage

> TravelNurseMortgage (travelnursemortgage.com) helps U.S. travel nurses and agency medical staff buy homes and refinance. It matches nurses with licensed mortgage specialists whose lenders correctly count travel-contract income: taxable base plus documented recurring stipends, continuous contract history across agencies, overtime/differentials, and 1099 or bank-statement paths for contractor nurses. TravelNurseMortgage is an AdaptLend service (adaptlend.com) and is not a lender.

## Key facts

- Travel nurses can get mortgages: lenders want 12–24 months of continuous travel history; agency changes every 13 weeks are normal, not job-hopping — keep every contract and pay summary.
- Tax-free stipends (housing/meals) can count as qualifying income with some lenders when documented, recurring, and likely to continue; many lenders refuse them — lender matching can nearly double qualifying income.
- 1099 contractor nurses can use 1099 mortgage programs (~90% of gross 1099 totals) or bank statement programs (12–24 months of deposits) — no write-off penalty.
- Prior staff-nursing W-2 history bridges shorter travel history (same line of work).
- Stipends assume an IRS "tax home"; how buying a home interacts with stipends is a tax-professional question — the site says so.
- Filling out the form does not affect credit; a credit check only happens if the borrower moves forward with a specialist.

## How it works

1. Answer a few plain-English questions (about two minutes, no credit check, no login).
2. TravelNurseMortgage matches the borrower with a licensed specialist who documents travel income correctly.
3. The specialist contacts the borrower within one business day.

## Related resources

- [Home loans for nurses guide](https://adaptlend.com/nurses.html)
- [1099 mortgages explained](https://adaptlend.com/1099-mortgage.html)
- [Bank statement loans](https://adaptlend.com/bank-statement-loans.html)
- [1099-contractor mortgage guide](https://lumolend.com/guides/mortgage-for-1099-contractors/) — LumoLend, an Honest Casa company
- [Free DTI calculator](https://lumolend.com/tools/dti-calculator/) — LumoLend
- [LumoLend](https://lumolend.com/) — price purchase, refinance, and HELOC scenarios with live indicative rates; free calculators and 40+ mortgage guides
